Reviews Contact

About VOGUE Parquet®

12+ years serving Miami and surrounding areas

VOGUE Parquet® started with a simple mission: to raise the standard for flooring installation in Miami. Frustrated with inconsistent quality and unreliable service, we set out to build a company that prioritizes craftsmanship and customer satisfaction. Our founder, a Miami native, understood the unique challenges our climate presents and the importance of flooring that lasts.

Our approach is simple: meticulous preparation, expert installation, and premium materials. We don't cut corners. We believe in open communication, transparent pricing, and exceeding expectations. From initial consultation to final inspection, we're dedicated to ensuring a seamless and stress-free experience.

We’re proud to be a part of the Miami community. We actively support local initiatives and source materials from regional suppliers whenever possible. Our commitment extends beyond flooring; we're invested in the well-being of our city and its residents.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
VOGUE Parquet®

Trusted flooring installer professionals serving Miami, FL and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
